λ.value: λ (active failure rate of each component)
λ.description: The active failure rate of each identical component in the system, used in computing the system reliability function R(t) = (1+2λt)e^{-2λt}.

t.description: Time variable over which the system reliability is evaluated. Acts as the independent variable in the reliability function R(t).

R(t).description: The reliability of the 2-out-of-3 standby redundant system as a function of time, which is the quantity to be found.
